title: Classic Reimagined for Sodium and Mods
body:
# Classic Reimagined Compatibility layer
### **🧩 What It Does**
It fixes [Classic Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/project/PkWfJYwX) from faling to load on Sodium, it gives full compatibility with Sodium while enhancing visuals with such mods

### ✅ Why It Matters
- Preserves Classic Reimagined's retro aesthetic while benefiting from Sodium’s performance enhancements.
- Eliminates reliance on OptiFine, making Classic Reimagined viable in modpacks built for speed and modularity.
- Streamlines texture and model behavior to prevent crashes or unexpected visuals when Sodium is installed.

### Required mods
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium): You may already have this one installed, and if not, then you don't need this resource pack
- [Sodium Core Shader Support](https://modrinth.com/project/G8yJPRdl): This mod is required for Sodium to support core shaders
- [Polytone](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone): For custom colors, cloud height, etc.

![Install Instructions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pA8H0yFe/images/314a9da61741c58ab3c3920bf938394a350e5cdc.png)
